title: BossBarAnnounce
description: An advanced plugin that can annouce things on the bossbar. More commands are comming soon! And Geyser support!
body:
Bossbar Announcements

**Look down for photos**

Bossbar Announcements is a lightweight and easy-to-use bossbar announcement plugin for Minecraft servers.
With just a few simple commands, you can display messages directly in the bossbar, making sure all players — Java and Bedrock via Geyser — see your important updates instantly.
_____________________________________________________________________________________________

✨ **Features**

- ✅ Show custom messages in the bossbar
 
- ✅ Clear the bossbar with one command
 
- ✅ Fully supports Paper, Spigot, Purpur (1.21+)
 
- ✅ Works with Geyser & Floodgate (Bedrock players see the bossbar too!)
 
- ✅ Lightweight & fast — won’t slow down your server

- ✅ Save and load for eazy announcements (**check the config**) 
_____________________________________________________________________________________________


📜 Commands

- /bba announce [seconds] <text>


Create a boss bar announcement.

seconds is optional; if provided, the boss bar will automatically disappear after that time.

**STILL IN PROGRAMING** Minecraft color codes (&a, §c) and hex colors (#FFA500) for text.

- /bba clear


Remove the current boss bar.

- /bba color <RED|BLUE|GREEN|YELLOW|PURPLE|WHITE|PINK>


Change the color of the boss bar.

Must have an active boss bar first.

- /bba style <SOLID|SEGMENTED_6|SEGMENTED_10|SEGMENTED_12|SEGMENTED_20>

Change the style of the boss bar.

Must have an active boss bar first.

- /bba reload

Reload the plugin configuration.

- /bba load <barName>


Load a pre-configured bossbar from config.yml.

Example config:

default-bars:
  example:
    text: "&aWelcome!"
    color: GREEN
    style: SEGMENTED_10

/bba default color <RED|BLUE|GREEN|YELLOW|PURPLE|WHITE|PINK>


Set the default color for new bossbars.

/bba default style <SOLID|SEGMENTED_6|SEGMENTED_10|SEGMENTED_12|SEGMENTED_20>


Set the default style for new bossbars.
_____________________________________________________________________________________________

🔮 **Planned Features**

- 🔁 Scheduled broadcasts (for events & rotations)

- 🌍 Per-world support (different bossbars in different worlds)

- ⚡ Multiple bossbars at once

- MiniMessage Support (Working on it!)
_____________________________________________________________________________________________

🛠 **Installation**

Download the latest release from Modrinth.

Drop the .jar file into your server’s plugins folder.

Restart the server.

Done! 🎉
_____________________________________________________________________________________________

📌 **Compatibility**

Minecraft Versions: 1.21+

Server Software: Paper, Spigot, Purpur

Bedrock Support: Fully compatible with Geyser & Floodgate
_____________________________________________________________________________________________

ℹ️ Why Bossbar Announcements?

- Shows announcements in the bossbar — impossible to miss for players.

- Supports both Java & Bedrock (with Geyser).

- Lightweight, simple to use, and perfect for events or server-wide alerts.
_____________________________________________________________________________________________

⚡ Keep your players informed in style with bossbar announcements!
More updates and features are on the way 🚀
_____________________________________________________________________________________________
